zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald Reynold Meade於1535年1月11日出生在英國艾可艾爾姆頓時，他的父親Thomas Meade VI24歲，母親Joan Wycliff13歲。他於1560年與Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1612年12月26日在英國薩默塞特巴斯享年77歲，埋葬在英國越可爾朗 利斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald Reynold Meade于1535年1月11日出生在英国艾可艾爾姆頓时，他的父亲Thomas Meade VI24岁，母亲Joan Wycliff13岁。他于1560年与Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1612年12月26日在英国薩默塞特巴斯享年77岁，埋葬在英国越可爾朗 利斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Meade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: habitational name from Midheach, the Gaelic name of County Meath in Ireland. Its Anglicized forms are now indistinguishable from those of the English name Mead .

variants.name: Mead
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a meadow, from Middle English mede ‘meadow’ (Old English mǣd), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places so named, such as Meads in Harford (Devon).
perhaps from Middle English mede ‘mead, alcoholic drink of fermented honey and water’, possibly denoting one who was fond of the drink or who made or sold mead. Compare Meader .

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

nameMeanings.name: Reynold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Reinald, Reynaud, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + wald ‘ruler’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them into England. In modern use, the given name sometimes represents a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman personal name.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald Reynold Meade was born on 11 January 1535, in Elmdon, Essex, England, his father, Thomas Meade VI, was 24 and his mother, Joan Wycliff, was 13. He married Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland in 1560, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 26 December 1612, in Bath, Somerset, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Long Riston, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald Reynold Meade est né le 11 janvier 1535, à Elmdon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Meade VI, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Wycliff, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland en 1560, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 26 décembre 1612, à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Long Riston, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald Reynold Meade am 11. Januar 1535 in Elmdon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Meade VI 24 und seine Mutter Joan Wycliff 13. Er hat 1560 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Dezember 1612 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Bath, Somerset, England und wurde in Long Riston, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald Reynold Meade è nato il il 11 gennaio 1535 nel Elmdon, Essex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Meade VI, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joan Wycliff, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland nel 1560, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 26 dicembre 1612, nel Bath, Somerset, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Long Riston, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald Reynold Meadeが1535年1月11日にイギリスエセックスエルムドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Meade VIは24歳，母Joan Wycliffは13歳であった。1560年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでBarbara Elizabeth Aspelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1612年12月26日にイギリスソメルセトバスで77歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアロング リストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald Reynold Meade(이)가 1535년 1월 11일 영국 에세스 엘던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Meade VI(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Wycliff(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1612년 12월 26일 영국 서머세트 바스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 론그 리스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.11 January 1535–26 December 1612: 11 de janeiro de 1535–26 de dezembro de 1612
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald Reynold Meade nasceu em 11 de janeiro de 1535, em Elmdon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Meade VI, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan Wycliff, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland em 1560, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de dezembro de 1612, em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Long Riston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald Reynold Meade родился 11 января 1535 г. в местности элмдон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Meade VI было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Wycliff, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland в 1560 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер 26 декабря 1612 г. в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности лонг ристон, еркшир, Англия.

es.11 January 1535–26 December 1612: 11 de enero de 1535–26 de diciembre de 1612
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald Reynold Meade nació el 11 de enero de 1535, en Elmdon, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Meade VI, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan Wycliff, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Barbara Elizabeth Aspeland en 1560, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 26 de diciembre de 1612, en Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Long Riston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
